caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 90% rain probability with winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 5.4 ft, while nearby Martinique has a wind forecast of 13 kt. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations in the Lesser Antilles, particularly at ports in St. Lucia and Martinique, where passengers can expect rough seas and heavy downpours.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing a 70% rain probability with winds reaching 12 kt and wave heights of 3.8 ft. Cadiz will see winds of 18 kt, making it the runner-up in terms of impact, with less than 10% rain probability not applicable for this location, as the data for Cadiz specifically is not provided, however, Dubrovnik's conditions are the main focus.
